creator: gary@hayers.org
text:
I contacted Sophos and they were quite adamant that they don't help open 
source but get the feeling they thought it was Linux related and didn't 
realise that the ports tree caters for manually downloading distfiles

Sent from my iPhone

On 25/11/2013 14:23, Philippe Audéoud wrote:
> Ok, so, what can we do? Do we a solution to port this software? If not,
> I guess we can close this ticket.
>
> Regards,
>
